details.text: l. Blindness,cataracts, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes
m. Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficult in swal-lowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat

examples: No, I don't smoke regularly, but there and there it happens. But if you want to keep it as regular, you can look at. Like yesterday, I didn't smoke. Day before, I didn't. Now, I don't know if today I will, but tomorrow I might. So, I might as well declare it as that.
I drink once or twice. So I don't know how you want to take that.
You can mention 5'9 or 5'. I mean because I don't want to 5'9 or 5'10.
Uh, I know that my bad cholesterol is on the higher side. I think it was about 114 or 115 or something like that, or 214, 215.
Ma'am, I don't have it, I don't have it readily available with me but you're going to come for a physical test anyway, so you'll know then. So right now you can take it as raised cholesterol.
Ma'am, five years ago, ma'am. I'm sorry, even you wouldn't remember, I don't remember.
